case_title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. VS. ANTONIO AVALOS

docket_entries.description: STATEMENT OF EVIDENCE IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT 585 (TRANSACTION ID # 200047112) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.
